---
title: "Lint Warnings Example"
format: html
---

# Code with lint issues

## Anti-pattern: setwd

```{r bad-setwd}
setwd("/Users/student/Desktop/homework")
x <- 1:10
```

## Anti-pattern: absolute path

```{r bad-path}
data <- read.csv("/home/student/data/file.csv")
```

## Anti-pattern: install.packages

```{r bad-install}
install.packages("ggplot2")
library(ggplot2)
```

## Anti-pattern: rm(list=ls())

```{r bad-rm}
rm(list=ls())
x <- 1:10
```

## Clean chunk (no warnings)

```{r clean}
y <- mean(1:10)
cat("Mean:", y, "\n")
```
